titleStmt.title: SII 10.749: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 749. (A.R. No. 750 of 1920.) ON A NANDI-PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF SŌMĒŚVARA, JUTTIGA, TANUKU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1505. (Svabhānu)

summary.p: Records that, under the orders of king Muhammand Quli Pādshāh, son of Ibrāhīm Shāh, Sattirāju Sōmarāju's son Peddirāju and his son Sōmēśvara consecrated certain temples etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastaśrīvijayābhyu
dayaparaṁparābhivṛddhigānu
śālivāhanaśaka varuṣālu 1505
svabhānusaṁvvatsara Āśvīja śu 10
śa dūtika vāsukiravisōmēśva
ruṁḍu modalaina dēvaḷu Ibhurā
ṁśā Ankaṇānanu khilamai pōtēnu
Āyanakumāruṁḍu mahamaṁ
du khullipādaśaha rajāAyiphaki hā
jñakramānanu sattirāju sōmarā
ju kumāruṁḍu peddirāju pe
ddirāju kumāruṁḍu sōmē
śvaruṁḍu vāsukaravisōmali
ṁgamununnu vijñānēśvarumū
nni sattarāmaliṁgamununnu prati
ṣṭhacēśi yidēvaguṁḍu gaṭiṁci su
ṁnapavi cēyiṁcenu rāmaliṁga
mu muṁddari maṁṭṭapamunu A
vala ga¨rbhagruhamu suṁnapani
cēyiṁcenu vināyikuniṁni du
¨rgganunnu bhairavuṇaṁni kaṁmaṭhēśva
ruṁḍu vāyuva¨rṇnuṁḍu
vaiṣṇavēśvaruni brahmēṁśvaru
ṁṇni kramānnu Ājñēyabhāgaṁ
nanu tamatōṁṭalōnu gōstanītī
rānanu pāpavināśanēśvaruṁṇni
sahapratiṣṭhalu cēsi dēvu

ḷālu gaṭiṁcenu su
nnapanulu cēyiṁccenu
vumāmahēśvaraprīti
gānumnu tallidaṁḍrā
dulu peddirājuku
nnu tallini maku
nnu puṇyamugānu
cēstimi sattirāju
sōmarāju kumāruḍu
sōmēśvaruṁ dama A
tta laccama gōpinā
dhuṇṇi pratiṣṭhiṁciri dē
vuḷamu kaṭiṁci su
ṁnna pani cēyiṁccenu
Umāmahēśvaraprī
tigānunu tallidaṁḍrā
dulu sōmarājukuṁ
nu tallisōmavvakunu
puṇyamugānu ceyi
ṁccenu . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattāṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.749 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
